summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Coach Signals Fix (iteration 225). All 18 backend tests passed and frontend verification successful. The fix for ISO timestamp date parsing in top_action_engine.py is working correctly - coach flags, assigned actions, and overdue detection are all functioning as expected.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing re-seeded data with coach_flags
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Signals Fix testing complete (iteration 225). Key verified features: 1) ISO date parsing fix in top_action_engine.py (line 257-270) - extracts first 10 chars from ISO timestamps like '2026-03-17T20:51:37+00:00' to get 'YYYY-MM-DD' format, 2) coach_flags collection has 4 active flags (Emma: Emory + Stanford, Ava: UGA, Isabella: Texas A&M), 3) pod_actions have assigned_to_athlete: True field, 4) GET /api/athlete/flags returns active coach flags correctly, 5) GET /api/internal/programs/top-actions returns real actions (not all no_action_needed), 6) Priority ordering works: coach_flag (P1) > overdue_followup (P4) > on_track (P8), 7) Frontend Pipeline page shows hero card with Emory as TOP PRIORITY with '2 DAYS OVERDUE' badge, 8) Next Actions section shows Stanford with 'In 3 days'.

emma_coach_flags.result: PASS - Returns 2 active flags (Emory: reply_needed, Stanford: strong_interest)

emma_top_actions.result: PASS - Returns real actions with coach_flag category at priority 1

ava_top_actions.result: PASS - UGA coach_flag at priority 1 is first action

isabella_top_actions.result: PASS - Texas A&M coach_flag (P1) before Alabama overdue_followup (P4)

iso_date_parsing.result: PASS - All actions have valid reason_codes (no silent parsing failures)

frontend_verification.hero_card_visible: PASS - Shows Emory University as TOP PRIORITY
frontend_verification.what_changed_section: PASS - Shows 'Emory University needs immediate attention'
frontend_verification.next_actions_section: PASS - Shows Stanford University with 'In 3 days'

fix_details.root_cause: ISO timestamps like '2026-03-17T20:51:37+00:00' were being passed to strptime('%Y-%m-%d') which silently failed, causing all programs to appear as 'on track'
fix_details.fix_description: Extract first 10 characters (YYYY-MM-DD) from ISO string before parsing: due_str = next_due[:10] if len(next_due) >= 10 else next_due
